tweets.text:
Sanctuary policies ONLY protect criminal aliens. 
 
Don't listen to the sanctuary politicians who falsely claim that their policies allow aliens who witness or are victims of crime to come forward. 
 
Congress already took care of that. They're called U visas, T visas, and VAWA protections.

tweets.text:
• POSSESSING A STOLEN VEHICLE
• SELLING AMPHETAMINE
• DRUG POSSESSION
• ILLEGAL REENTRY
• OBSTRUCTING POLICE
• PUBLIC ORDER CRIMES

With six arrests between 2010 and 2014 in California, Fabian Pablo Beltran-Flores, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico, also has a whopping 13 immigration apprehensions since 2010 and an expedited removal order from 2011.

One arrest in CA was for stealing a vehicle and driving in excess of 100 mph on a suspended license! 

Moving north, police in Washington arrested him in 2024 for reckless driving, attempting to elude police, driving without a license and resisting arrest.

Thanks to CBP’s strong border security, this deportation will be his last.

tweets.text:
THANK YOU  
 
This patriotic family delivered a care package of snacks, hand warmers, and more for our brave law enforcement officers in Minneapolis. 

ICE officers are enduring nonstop assaults, vehicle attacks, death threats and freezing temperatures while they fight to protect America. The support of millions of patriotic Americans means the world to us.

tweets.text:
CRIMINAL ILLEGAL ALIEN RAMS ICE LAW ENFORCEMENT IN MINNESOTA

Tranquilino Sixto-Anorve, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico with multiple DUIs, rammed an ICE vehicle and struck a civilian car this morning in St. Paul, MN.

ICE targeted Sixto-Anorve for arrest because his criminal history indicated he was a PUBLIC SAFETY THREAT.

Vehicle rammings against ICE are up OVER 3,000%. This ramming highlights increased risks our brave men and women of ICE face amid hostile rhetoric and actions from anti-ICE agitators and politicians.

Sixto-Anorve is in ICE custody.

tweets.text:
REAL TRUTH: Agitators obstructed a targeted enforcement operation in which ICE officers stopped a driver charged with domestic violence in Hennepin County.

FAKE NEWS LIES: ICE “stole a car,” “chased a random driver through Minneapolis,” “left the scene of an accident.”

Hennepin County ignored our detainer for Danny Jhonatan Antunish Utitas, a criminal illegal alien from Ecuador with a final removal order, and released him into the community with ZERO regard for his immigration status, flight risk or victim.

This is EXACTLY what Border Czar Homan was talking about.

Despite our officers’ best efforts, the agitator obstruction and excess protester presence created the perfect flight opportunity for the criminal illegal alien to avoid arrest.

And incidentally, ICE moved his vehicle from the street and parked it in a safer location.

FUGITIVE CAUGHT 

Mexican criminal illegal alien Carlos Federico Valenzuela Cadena tried — and failed — to hide in the U.S. 

ICE Houston officers arrested the 63-year-old fugitive, who’s wanted in Mexico for ORGANIZED CRIME, FRAUD, and EXTORTION. 

We’ll get him to Mexican authorities to face the music for his alleged crimes. The U.S. is no safe haven for those fleeing justice. 

Under President Trump, America is no longer a safe haven for criminal illegal aliens.

tweets.text:
CHILD SEX OFFENDER ARRESTED IN MINNESOTA 

On Jan. 29, ICE apprehended Vong Chai Xiong, a criminal illegal alien from Laos, convicted of sexual abuse against a child aged 13 to 15 in Maplewood, Minnesota. 

Xiong entered the U.S. as a refugee and became a lawful permanent resident in 2007, but his shocking crime cost him that status. He was placed into removal proceedings, and in 2019, a judge issued his final removal order.
tweets.text_resolved:
CHILD SEX OFFENDER ARRESTED IN MINNESOTA 

On Jan. 29, ICE apprehended Vong Chai Xiong, a criminal illegal alien from Laos, convicted of sexual abuse against a child aged 13 to 15 in Maplewood, Minnesota. 

Xiong entered the U.S. as a refugee and became a lawful permanent resident in 2007, but his shocking crime cost him that status. He was placed into removal proceedings, and in 2019, a judge issued his final removal order.

tweets.text:
Elaine Antao and Manal Wasef — both of Brooklyn, NY — pleaded guilty Jan. 15 in federal court to conspiring to defraud Medicaid by paying health care kickbacks for services that were not provided at two Brooklyn adult day cares and a home health care company. 

When sentenced, the defendants each face up to 10 years in prison.  

ICE HSI New York special agents were part of the federal team investigating this fraud case. 

“These defendants placed profit over people and public well-being and stole $68 million in welfare funds meant for those who need it most,” said ICE New York Special Agent in Charge Ricky J. Patel.
tweets.text_resolved:
Elaine Antao and Manal Wasef — both of Brooklyn, NY — pleaded guilty Jan. 15 in federal court to conspiring to defraud Medicaid by paying health care kickbacks for services that were not provided at two Brooklyn adult day cares and a home health care company. 

When sentenced, the defendants each face up to 10 years in prison.  

ICE HSI New York special agents were part of the federal team investigating this fraud case. 

“These defendants placed profit over people and public well-being and stole $68 million in welfare funds meant for those who need it most,” said ICE New York Special Agent in Charge Ricky J. Patel.

tweets.text:
On January 21, ICE Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) responded to a request from the Sherburne County Sheriff’s Office in Zimmerman, MN, to help locate a missing 7-year-old girl after an AMBER Alert. HSI teams braved sub-freezing temperatures, canvassed neighborhoods, and worked closely with local law enforcement, gathering surveillance information to aid the search.
 
On January 22, HSI was notified that the child was found safe and the alleged sexual assaulter and kidnapper, 28-year-old Joseph Andrew Bragg, was taken into custody.
 
HSI is proud to have helped bring this young girl home and ensure alleged child predators are removed from Minnesota’s streets.
tweets.text_resolved:
On January 21, ICE Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) responded to a request from the Sherburne County Sheriff’s Office in Zimmerman, MN, to help locate a missing 7-year-old girl after an AMBER Alert. HSI teams braved sub-freezing temperatures, canvassed neighborhoods, and worked closely with local law enforcement, gathering surveillance information to aid the search.
 
On January 22, HSI was notified that the child was found safe and the alleged sexual assaulter and kidnapper, 28-year-old Joseph Andrew Bragg, was taken into custody.
 
HSI is proud to have helped bring this young girl home and ensure alleged child predators are removed from Minnesota’s streets.

CRIMINAL ILLEGAL ALIEN SENTENCED TO PRISON FOR ASSAULTING FEDERAL OFFICERS 

Guido Andres Alexander Cuellar-Batres, a criminal illegal alien from Guatemala with prior charges for assault & battery on a family/household member, was sentenced in federal court Jan. 12, 2026, to 8 months in prison. 

The Guatemalan national bit, head-butted, struck and spat at officers during his targeted arrest. 

ICE will be waiting to re-arrest him on his immigration violations as a violent criminal illegal alien when he’s released from prison.
